case_title: ADRIENNE MCDOWELL VANN VS. CHRISTINE V WITHERSPOON ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-16-2019 CONTINUED TO FEB-27-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ADRIENNE MCDOWELL VANN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-23-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-09-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-23-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANN, ADRIENNE MCDOWELL AS TO DEFENDANT WITHERSPOON, CHRISTINE V HOLMAN, PALAMA GRAYSON MOTEN, DOROTHY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-16-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-12-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-24-2018
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-23-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2019 CONTINUED TO JUL-23-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-23-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANN, ADRIENNE MCDOWELL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANN, ADRIENNE MCDOWELL AS TO DEFENDANT WITHERSPOON, CHRISTINE V HOLMAN, PALAMA GRAYSON MOTEN, DOROTHY DOES 1 TO 10 MATHIS, IMA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE FEB-27-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED ON AMENDED COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF VANN, ADRIENNE MCDOWELL

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Sanctions previously imposed for failure to appear. No appearance or objection. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: ANDREW Y.S. CHENG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Continued To Jul-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Self Represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Jul-23-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE GARRET L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
